summary: Frontend-only Expo/React Native calculator app tested end-to-end on mobile viewport (390x844) via web preview. All 15 feature requirements verified across 24 individual assertions — every test PASSED. Basic arithmetic (7+8=15, 6×7=42, 9-4=5, 8/2=4), percent (50+10%=50.1), clear, backspace, sign toggle (5→-5), decimal (0.5), scientific keypad visibility, sin(0)=0, sqrt(9)=3, 2^3=8, 5!=120, π=3.14159265359, mode switching, Bengali numeral toggle (123→১২৩), history panel open/populate/tap-to-restore/clear→empty, and persistence of mode+language across page reload all worked correctly. No backend in this app. Minor non-blocking console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated in react-native-web — should switch to boxShadow (cosmetic, no functional impact).

react_native_issues.issue: react-native-web logs deprecation warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:597-601 (shadowColor, shadowOffset, shadowOpacity, shadowRadius). Cosmetic only on web; native still uses these. Consider Platform.select or migrating to boxShadow for web.

action_items: (Optional/Cosmetic) Replace shadow* style props in historyPanel with Platform-aware boxShadow to silence react-native-web deprecation warning.
No functional fixes required — all 15 specified features work as described.
critical_code_review_comments: evaluator.ts sanitize() throws 'Bad factorial' inside a while-loop check that can never trigger as written (the inner condition is guarded by the outer while); harmless but dead-ish code.
evaluator.ts character whitelist regex on line 49 is effectively unused (no throw on failure); the line 52 regex provides the real guard.
expo-haptics correctly no-ops on web via .catch(() => {}) — good defensive pattern.
Storage layer (AsyncStorage / web equivalent) successfully persists prefs (mode, lang) across reload — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App URL: https://mobile-calculator-39.preview.emergentagent.com. All interactive elements have testIDs. Use mobile viewport 390x844. Scientific keypad becomes visible only when seg-mode-sci is selected. History panel uses absolute-positioned overlay with btn-close-history. Bengali numerals appear in display-expression / display-result / history items when lang='bn'. Persistence keys: calc.prefs.v1 (theme/lang/mode) and calc.history.v1.
